org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport

类 ClientDelegate

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.ClientDelegate
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Resetable, Channel, Client, Endpoint, IdleSensible

    public class ClientDelegate
extends Object
implements Client
    ClientDelegate
